eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Pima, AZ; at 2:30 PM on JUN 2, 2026 Effective until 10:30 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Tucson, AZ. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Tucson Police Department is looking for 76-year-old Loreto Ruiz. He walked away from his home near South Missiondale and West Bilby Roads between 9:00 PM and 11:30 PM, on May 31, 2026, and has not returned. Efforts by police and family to locate Mr. Ruiz have been unsuccessful. Mr. Ruiz is described as a Hispanic male, approximately five feet four inches tall, 140 pounds, with brown eyes, white hair, and a full white beard. He was last seen wearing a dark red, striped T-shirt, shorts, and black sandals. Mr. Ruiz suffers from a condition that causes confusion, memory loss, and disorientation. Additionally, he has significant medical issues that require regular medication. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
